publisher: Ofgem (Office of Gas and Electricity Markets), UK
confirmed_file_url_note: Confirmed 2026-06-18 via HEAD probe: HTTP 200, content-type=application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet, last-modified=Thu 21 May 2026 09:00:46 GMT, size=256.1 KB
source_period_note: source_period is the YYYY-MM in the file URL path — the month Ofgem published this file version. snapshot is the local collection month (when we downloaded it). They differ when a new snapshot is not yet available.

parse_results.certificationStatusNote: listed_no_expiry_date = on PEL but cert body (MCS/BSI/BBA) does not record expiry. active_with_expiry = future certified_until > 90 days. expiry_imminent = future certified_until within 90 days. expired_confirmed = past certified_until (none in 2026-05 snapshot). date_parse_failed = string present but unparseable.
parse_results.mcsNumberFormat: Format: '<base> <model_suffix>' e.g. '24.01.020 AW162HVGHA/HU162WAHYB'. mcs_number_base = part before first space. mcs_model_suffix = part after first space (null when base only).

validation.noBlankMarkedActive: PASS — blank certified_until is listed_no_expiry_date, not active

certified_until_investigation.finding: Blank certified_until indicates the certification body (MCS, BSI, BBA) does not record expiry dates for their certs — NOT that the product is unknown or suspect.
certified_until_investigation.interpretation: All records in the 2026-05 PEL snapshot have either no expiry date recorded or a future expiry date. Zero records had a past expiry date. Blank certified_until is a data provenance distinction — the certification body does not record expiry dates for these products. PEL listing does not guarantee full BUS eligibility; verify all requirements independently.
certified_until_investigation.policy: Use listed_no_expiry_date for blank. Do not call blank records active_confirmed. Do not claim full BUS eligibility from PEL listing alone.

legal_notes: PEL data is published by Ofgem as a public administrative tool under the Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS).
It is extracted from the MCS certified product directory. Products on the PEL meet MCS standards required by BUS.
Ofgem disclaimer: the PEL does not ensure compliance with all BUS eligibility criteria — installers must verify independently.
No authentication required for public file download.
Monthly refresh obligation: PEL is updated by Ofgem when new products are certified or existing products expire.

app_build.short_names: scripts/ofgem/manufacturer-short-names-gb.json (137 heat pump brands, curated overrides + suffix-strip heuristic)

outputs.commercial: public/data/products-commercial-gb.json (0 items — intentionally empty, see policy)

policies.segmentation: PEL has no capacity/SCOP data → capacity segmentation impossible; all heat pumps exported to residential dataset with market_segment null; commercial dataset empty
policies.duplicates: Duplicate MCS numbers are real model variants sharing one cert number; kept, with source_id suffixed '#n' (15 records across 4 groups). mcs_number stays raw for display.
policies.installation_type: Derived only from explicit Monobloc/Split keywords in product_name/model (installation_type_derived='name_keyword', 140 records); else null
policies.field_shape: 92 fields = DE 75-key parity (DE-only values null) + 17 GB/PEL provenance keys. Loader/view model handle nulls as '—'.

results.brand_overlap: 42 of 137 PEL brands also on BAFA

bafa_reference_matching.policy: Brand-gated (short-name equality) + exact token sequence or contiguous token subsequence; multi-candidate accepted only with identical specs; NO plain substring matching (false variant matches like 'WPL 25 AS' vs 'WPL 25 A' were observed and rejected in design).
bafa_reference_matching.semantics: Match = same hardware listed on German BAFA registry. Copied specs are a technical cross-reference (performance_source='BAFA_REFERENCE'), not UK certification data. Matched records are capacity-segmented (53 → products-commercial-gb.json); unmatched stay residential with market_segment null.

eprel_matching.policy: Brand-gated (GB short-name token sequence in EPREL supplier/organisation tokens) + exact/contiguous token-sequence matching; multi-candidate accepted only with identical label values (latest registration kept); no plain substring.
eprel_matching.semantics: Copied values are official EU label data per EU 811/2013 (ηs 35/55, design heat output, sound power). SCOP/COP are not on EPREL and are NOT derived. One performance source per record: BAFA_REFERENCE takes precedence; EPREL fills performance only on records without a BAFA match (performance_source='EPREL', 1,093 records); eprel_registration_number set on every match (1,428). Total records with performance data: 1,677/4,422 (38%).

next_recommended_step: GB dataset pipeline complete (PEL + BAFA_REFERENCE + EPREL). Next candidates: DE EPREL matching (reuse the same matcher family against BAFA master seed); monthly GB refresh run order: fetch-pel-xlsx → parse-pel-xlsx → match-pel-to-bafa → match-pel-to-eprel → build-app-products-gb → deploy:uk.
